# s09 sample interaction

# Setup (3 terminals or 3 background processes):
#   ./s09 gateway -addr :7079             # Terminal 1
#   ./s09 scheduler -interval 1s -echo    # Terminal 2

# Post a message:
#   curl -X POST -d '{"source":"demo","prompt":"hello"}' http://localhost:7079/msg
#   {"job_id":1}

# Inspect:
#   ./s09 jobs
#   #1     demo     done      2026-05-09 15:30:11  hello
#          result: echo: hello

# Schedule a recurring job:
#   ./s09 cron add "every 30s" "show me the time"
#   cron entry 1 added: every 30s -> "show me the time"

# After the scheduler ticks past the cron interval:
#   ./s09 jobs
#   #2     cron     done      2026-05-09 15:30:42  show me the time
#          result: echo: show me the time
#   #1     demo     done      2026-05-09 15:30:11  hello
#          result: echo: hello

# Real LLM mode (drop -echo, set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY):
#   ./s09 scheduler -interval 1s
#   curl -X POST -d '{"prompt":"compute 17 * 23 with bash"}' http://localhost:7079/msg
#   ./s09 jobs
#   #3     gateway  done      2026-05-09 15:31:05  compute 17 * 23 with bash
#          result: 17 * 23 = 391.
